# Diagram: research/orchestrator/tasks/etl/extract_location_lad_spark.py


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start main]) --> InitSpark[Initialize SparkContext with YARN master]
    InitSpark --> ConfigSpark[Configure Spark settings:<br/>- allowNegativeScaleOfDecimal<br/>- executorIdleTimeout<br/>- parquet.int96RebaseModeInWrite]
    ConfigSpark --> InitSQL[Initialize SQLContext]
    InitSQL --> ParseArgs[Parse command line arguments:<br/>s3_output_path, DB credentials, DATABASE]
    ParseArgs --> PrintTable[Print loading message for table]
    PrintTable --> ReadJDBC[Read data from PostgreSQL via JDBC]
    ReadJDBC --> WriteParquet[Write DataFrame to S3 as Parquet<br/>mode='overwrite']
    WriteParquet --> ReadBack[Read back Parquet from S3]
    ReadBack --> GetLatest[Call get_latest_path to remove version]
    GetLatest --> WriteLatest[Write to latest path as Parquet<br/>mode='overwrite']
    WriteLatest --> End([End])
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[get_latest_path] --> B[Split path by '/']
    B --> C[Remove second-to-last part<br/>version timestamp]
    C --> D[Join parts back]
    D --> E[Return unversioned path]
```

## Diagram 3

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    F[extract_from_id_query] --> G{Does table contain '.'?}
    G -->|Yes| H[Extract table name after last '.']
    G -->|No| I[Use table as-is]
    H --> J[Build SQL query with WHERE id > extract_from_id]
    I --> J
    J --> K[Return query string]
```

## Diagram 4

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    L[get_last_id] --> M[Aggregate max id from DataFrame]
    M --> N{Exception?}
    N -->|No| O[Extract max_id from result]
    N -->|Yes| P[Return None]
    O --> Q[Return max_id]
```

## Diagram 5

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Main
    participant SparkContext
    participant SQLContext
    participant PostgreSQL
    participant S3
    
    Main->>SparkContext: Initialize with YARN master
    Main->>SparkContext: Set Spark configurations
    Main->>SQLContext: Initialize SQLContext
    Main->>SQLContext: Set legacy config
    Main->>PostgreSQL: Read table via JDBC
    PostgreSQL-->>Main: Return DataFrame
    Main->>S3: Write DataFrame as Parquet (versioned)
    Main->>S3: Read back Parquet
    S3-->>Main: Return DataFrame
    Main->>Main: get_latest_path (remove version)
    Main->>S3: Write DataFrame to latest path
    S3-->>Main: Complete
```
